title: Devils' Line
sourceNotes: Single-cour, 12-episode anime adapting roughly the first six of fourteen manga volumes. Manga (Ryo Hanada, Morning Two) is complete at 80 chapters ('Lines'); no named-arc breakdown was found for this series (chapters are numbered, not titled by arc), so broad volume-range entries are used per episode-to-chapter sync guides, which place the anime's ending around chapter 38. A separate 2018 OVA, 'Anytime Anywhere,' bundled with manga volume 12, retells a parents' backstory side-story rather than continuing the main chapter sequence, so it is not folded into the cumulative episode numbering here.
